title: Image Classification Based on Object Detection
scenario: Write a prompt that will classify an image based on object detection using a pre-trained model. The input will be the image and a list of objects to detect (e.g., 'person', 'car', 'tree'). The output should include the classified image and a list of detected objects with their confidence scores. The prompt must use the classification model's API and be under 50 words. The classification model should prioritize images with multiple objects.
constraints: Must use pre-trained model for object detection

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the classification model used accurate for images with multiple objects?
Does the prompt include object detection in the classification process?
Is the output in markdown format and within the 50-character limit for the species name?
Can the bot understand and execute the prompt without further explanation?
